entity.name: Rosemary (Uche) Chukwuka
entity.description: Self-taught full-stack software engineer from Nigeria building open source e-commerce and fintech tools.

projects.name: GreenCart
projects.description: Open source full-stack e-commerce platform serving real users, featuring JWT authentication, Stripe payments, admin dashboard with role-based access control, and Cloudinary image optimization. Built with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.

plans.name: General Development Support
plans.description: Support ongoing development and maintenance of GreenCart and future open source tools.
